title: MCP Server
description: External MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers that can be connected to Port

url.title: URL
url.description: The URL of the MCP server

allowed_tools.title: Allowed Tools
allowed_tools.description: Array of regex patterns for tool names that are allowed from this MCP server

oauth_config.title: OAuth Config
oauth_config.description: OAuth configuration for servers without DCR support

headers.title: Headers
headers.description: Custom headers to inject when connecting to the MCP server

exposed.title: Expose As Port Connector
exposed.description: If true, this MCP server will be available as a connector in the Port UI
